chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 118 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 02.06.2025 Mr. Miran Bux Shar, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant Prosecutor General along with SIP Ghulam Asghar on behalf of SSP Khairpur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Gulzar Ali Gilal, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.6, 7, 9 and 10, while comments on behalf of respondents No.2 and 5 have been filed, which are taken on record. Learned Counsel for the respondents submits that they have not harassed the petitioners and undertake that they shall not do so in the future. Learned AAG Sindh submits that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law. In view of the above, learned Counsel for the petitioners expresses satisfaction. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of. However, all respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. The official respondents are further directed to provide protection the petitioners as and when approached, in accordance with law. J U D G E Abdul Basit
